Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Dusk Mane Necrozma-GX
Effects: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.
You can use this attack only if you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Dialga-GX
Effects: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.
This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Take another turn after this one. (Skip the between-turns step. ) (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Palkia-GX
Effects: Move any number of Energy from your Benched Pokémon to this Pokémon.
This attack does 20 more damage times the amount of [W] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Shuffle all Energy from each of your opponent's Pokémon into their deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Escape Board
Description: The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is [C] less, and it can retreat even if it's Asleep or Paralyzed.

Name: Crushing Hammer
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

Name: Missing Clover
Description: You may play 4 Missing Clover cards at once. • If you played 1 card, look at the top card of your deck. • If you played 4 cards, take a Prize card. (This effect works one time for 4 cards. )

Name: Peeking Red Card
Description: Your opponent reveals their hand. You may have your opponent count the cards in their hand, shuffle those cards into their deck, then draw that many cards.

Name: Unit Energy GRW
Description: This card provides [C] Energy. While this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides [G], [R], and [W] Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

Name: Unit Energy LPM
Description: This card provides [C] Energy. While this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides [L], [P], and [M] Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

Name: Lunala-GX
Ability-Effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a [P] Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.
Effects: The Defending Pokémon can't be healed during your opponent's next turn.
Knock Out 1 of your opponent's Basic Pokémon that isn't a Pokémon-GX. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Solgaleo-GX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Effects: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.
Search your deck for up to 5 Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
